faqs.question: Why are silverfish so common in Orange homes?
faqs.answer: Orange's many older homes built in the late 1800s and early 1900s often have basements, crawl spaces, and bathrooms with moisture problems that attract silverfish. These pests feed on starches, paper, and fabric commonly found in attics and storage areas of historic properties.
